result.stdout:
Altairis TMD (Tutorial Markdown) Compiler version 2.5.0.0
Copyrigth (c) Michal A. Valasek - Altairis, 2019-2025

Compile TMD document to HTML
usage: tmdc path [/s] [/t:value] [/tb:value] [/as:value] [/debug]
    [/s]         Single table layout
        default value: False
    [/t:value]   Path to HTML template file
    [/tb:value]  Placeholder where to put the compiled markup
        default value: '<!--body-->'
    [/as:value]  After step template (appended after each step)
        default value: ''
    [/debug]     Debug mode
        default value: False
